notes.en: High yielding variety suited to rice-based products.

release_year.quote: Four rice varieties - Ld 376, BG 377, At 378, and BG 381 - have been introduced as high yielding rice varieties.

expected_yield_kg_per_acre.quote: high yielding variety that can successfully be used to produce rice-based products and gives 6.5 metric tons of paddy harvest per hectare
